task_completion.description: Verify that 'New-Topics' and 'Ongoing-Discussions' folders have been created in the email client.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left pane of the email client shows 'New-Topics' and 'Ongoing-Discussions' under the account folders.

task_completion.description: Verify that replies and forwards are moved to the 'Ongoing-Discussions' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Ongoing-Discussions' folder is selected and its message list shows emails with subjects starting with 'Re:', 'Fwd:', 'Aw:', or similar prefixes.

task_completion.description: Verify that original emails are moved to the 'New-Topics' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New-Topics' folder is selected and its message list shows original emails without reply/forward prefixes.

task_completion.description: Verify that the main Inbox is empty or nearly empty.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Inbox folder shows 0 or fewer than 5 emails remaining, indicating emails were successfully moved.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'new_topics_digest.txt' is created and contains the subject lines of the new topics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor window is open showing a file named 'new_topics_digest.txt' (saved in ~/Documents) containing a list of email subject lines.

task_completion.description: Verify that a draft email is composed to the triage team.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email composition window is open with the 'To' field set to 'triage-team@company.com', the 'Subject' set to 'Triage Priority List', and the body asking to review the New-Topics folder.

integrity.description: Verify that a real email client GUI was used to manage the emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: Folders and emails are visible within an email client interface (like Thunderbird), not just manipulated via terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify that the digest file was created/edited using a text editor or file manager.
integrity.visual_evidence: A GUI text editor (like gedit or mousepad) is visible with the digest file contents, or terminal shows valid file creation commands.

integrity.description: Verify that the draft email is composed in the email client's composer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The draft is visible in the email client's standard 'Write' or 'Compose' window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The inbox initially contains 50 emails: 36 replies/forwards and 14 new topics. The agent should move all 50 emails to their respective folders ('New-Topics' and 'Ongoing-Discussions'), leaving the main Inbox empty (or with fewer than 5 emails). The digest file must be located at ~/Documents/new_topics_digest.txt and contain the subjects of the 14 new topics. The draft email must be addressed to 'triage-team@company.com' with the subject 'Triage Priority List'.
